from fastapi import FastAPI
import importlib.metadata

app = FastAPI()

APP_VERSION: str | None = None
DEPENDENCY_VERSIONS: dict[str, str] = {}


@app.on_event("startup")
async def cache_versions():
    global APP_VERSION
    APP_VERSION = importlib.metadata.version("myapp")
    DEPENDENCY_VERSIONS["db_driver"] = importlib.metadata.version("sqlalchemy")
    DEPENDENCY_VERSIONS["cache_driver"] = importlib.metadata.version("redis")


@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    return {"status": "healthy", "version": APP_VERSION}


@app.get("/info")
async def app_info():
    return {
        "app": APP_VERSION,
        "db_driver": DEPENDENCY_VERSIONS["db_driver"],
        "cache_driver": DEPENDENCY_VERSIONS["cache_driver"],
    }
